generator_targets: ui-app-emit: add screen archetype vocabulary beyond list/detail/form/persona-dashboard. Today screenForService() infers ONE generic CRUD screen per service (DataTable list + Drawer detail/form) plus a persona dashboard (KPI + chart panels). Rich archetypes that appear across the corpus are NOT first-class generator outputs and currently only exist as bespoke screens in the 10 more-complete apps. Add these emittable screen kinds keyed off service contract shape + a per-screen `archetype` hint in app docs: kanban-board, calendar-board, scheduling-board, wizard (multi-step), workflow-canvas, approval-inbox, record-chart (tabbed clinical/customer 360), ledger/billing-flow, timeline-feed, search-filter-shell, checklist, map-view, kpi-grid. Each emits the same data-bound skeleton both surfaces reuse.

ui-app-emit: emit DUAL surface per app from one contract per the LENS. Generator should accept `surface: person|management` (or emit both) so each capability yields a journey-driven person surface AND a full-control management surface sharing the same SDK hooks + entity schema. Currently apps are single-surface and org-shaped; person surfaces are absent for most domains.

ui-app-emit: person-centric default layout primitives. Generator's default page chrome is admin AppShell (sidebar + DataTable). Add a `journey` shell variant (timeline/next-action spine, card-first, mobile-first) selectable per app/surface so person apps do not inherit the org-centric admin layout as primary.

ui-app-emit: wire DASHBOARD_PERSONAS to person vs management variants. Personas (donation/commerce/clinical/...) currently produce a management KPI dashboard. Add person-variant copy + panel sets (my care, my orders, my giving, my tasks) so the same persona emits a person-facing home when surface=person.

ui-app-native-emit (Expo): patient-app + clinician-app are scaffold-only. Generator must emit real data-bound mobile screens (appointment, messaging, billing, consent, care-plan, vitals, lab-results, problems, meds) from the same SDK hooks the web generator uses, not placeholder tabs.

@curaos/contracts + SDK codegen: many person/management screens depend on list+detail+search endpoints that the data-truth wave proved 404 for. Generator-emitted screens must bind to contract-declared list/detail/search/action operations; add a contract lint so a screen archetype that needs a search endpoint fails generation if the service contract lacks one (prevents emitting a search-shell over a missing route).

ui-kit: add the cross-cutting components missing from the 26-component set that the archetypes above require (see ui_kit_additions). These are domain-neutral and belong in @curaos/ui so both generator output and bespoke screens consume one source.

ui_kit_additions.why: 11 source kanban/board screens (Odoo CRM pipeline, project board, manufacturing, ERPNext, EspoCRM opportunity pipeline, COMS template board). No drag-orderable column board exists in ui-kit (only DataTable). Needed by both person (my tasks board) and management (sales pipeline) surfaces.
ui_kit_additions.data_deps: stage/column enum + draggable card items from a service list endpoint with status field
ui_kit_additions.a11y: keyboard reorder + ARIA grid roles + focus management on drag

ui_kit_additions.why: Calendars appear in 6+ systems (Odoo, OpenEMR calendar/wizard, OpenMRS appointments, Dolibarr bookcal, EspoCRM meeting/task calendar, VistA scheduling board). ui-kit has none; front-office + personal-tasks hand-roll. Person surface = my-appointments timeline; management = provider/room/resource scheduling board.
ui_kit_additions.data_deps: event list with start/end/resource/owner; availability slots; resource lanes
ui_kit_additions.a11y: grid navigation, screen-reader event summaries, time-zone + locale aware, RTL

ui_kit_additions.why: Source wizards: OpenEMR calendar/wizard, OpenMRS form-builder, AVS visit-summary wizard, COMS NewPlan + Authoring, n8n onboarding, ASRCM enter-variables flow, surgery checklist assignment. ui-kit has Tabs but no guided multi-step with validation gating + progress. Core to person-centric journeys (registration, intake, checkout, consent).
ui_kit_additions.data_deps: step schema (Zod per step), draft persistence, server validate-per-step
ui_kit_additions.a11y: step landmarks, progress announced, back/next focus, error summary per step

ui_kit_additions.why: Patient chart / patient file / cover sheet / customer 360 appears in OpenMRS patient-chart, OpenEMR patient_file tabs, ehmp CoverSheet, OpenHospital PatientFolder, SuiteCRM/EspoCRM account detail, Bahmni observation dashboard. A tabbed detail shell with header summary + section panels is the dominant detail pattern. ui-kit has Card + DescriptionList + Tabs but no composed record shell.
ui_kit_additions.data_deps: entity detail + related-resource lists (encounters, orders, notes, activities) via SDK
ui_kit_additions.a11y: tabpanel semantics, heading hierarchy, summary landmark

ui_kit_additions.why: Human-approval steps in Windmill approve page, activepieces approvals tab, business-automation approvals, COMS messages, BPM human tasks (153 workflow corpus rows have human_steps). Person surface = my approvals/consents to act on; management = task queue. No approval primitive in ui-kit.
ui_kit_additions.data_deps: pending human-task list + decision action (approve/reject/delegate) + context payload
ui_kit_additions.a11y: actionable list semantics, decision buttons labelled, confirm on irreversible

ui_kit_additions.why: DAG/visual editors: node-red, windmill flow editor, activepieces flow canvas, n8n canvas, suitecrm workflow builder, vista RulesEngine. workflow-designer hand-rolls @xyflow/react. Read-only canvas viewer + editable canvas belong in ui-kit so builder-studio, workflow apps, and clinical rules editor share one.
ui_kit_additions.a11y: keyboard node nav, ARIA for non-visual graph summary, focus order

ui_kit_additions.why: 90 grid screens + every list across corpus carry faceted search/filter (patient search, item list, invoice list, opportunity list). Generator emits DataTable but no standardized filter/search/saved-view bar. Person surface = simple search; management = advanced facets + saved views + column chooser (suitecrm-core columnchooser pattern).
ui_kit_additions.data_deps: facet schema from contract query params; full-text search endpoint; saved-view persistence
ui_kit_additions.a11y: search landmark, filter chips removable by keyboard, result-count live region

ui_kit_additions.why: Invoice/billing/claims forms across Dolibarr, Odoo, ERPNext, OpenEMR billing, OpenHospital BillBrowser, OpenMRS billing, VistA integrated billing (5 accounting + healthcare.revenue screens). Editable line-item grid with running totals, tax, installments. Person surface = simple statement/pay; management = full revenue-cycle editor. No money-grid in ui-kit.
ui_kit_additions.data_deps: line items, price/qty/tax/discount, totals computed server-side, payment status
ui_kit_additions.a11y: table totals associated, currency locale-aware, RTL numerals

ui_kit_additions.why: Surgery pre-proc checklist (8 screens), consent/checklist (maternity-tracker), care-plan tasks, daily-plan. Ordered/grouped completable items with status + assignment. Person surface = my prep steps; management = template-driven clinical checklist.
ui_kit_additions.data_deps: checklist template + per-item completion state + assignee
ui_kit_additions.a11y: checkbox group semantics, progress, completion announce

ui_kit_additions.why: Geospatial + fleet domains present (fleet-manager, geospatial service). No map primitive in ui-kit. Source has VistA panorama + location-bound flows. Person surface = track my delivery/visit; management = fleet/route board.
ui_kit_additions.data_deps: geo points/routes from geospatial service; live position events
ui_kit_additions.a11y: non-visual list fallback for map markers, keyboard pan/zoom

ui_kit_additions.why: ehmp NewsFeed/timeline, EspoCRM activity stream, audit trails, care-plan progress, CRM activities/calls/notes. ui-kit has Timeline (visual) but not a data-bound paginated activity feed. Person-centric spine for journey apps (my health timeline, my account activity).
ui_kit_additions.data_deps: paginated activity/event list per subject; actor + verb + object + ts
ui_kit_additions.a11y: feed role, incremental load announce, relative-time accessible labels

ui_kit_additions.why: ERPNext query-reports (general-ledger, stock-ledger), pophealth measure views, RAPTOR reports, ASRCM summary/utilization, SuiteCRM AOR reports, P&L dashboard. Parameterized report run + export. Generator persona-dashboard covers KPI tiles but not tabular parameterized reports.
ui_kit_additions.data_deps: report definition (params + columns) from reports service; export endpoint
ui_kit_additions.a11y: data table semantics, export labelled, param form accessible

ui_kit_additions.why: Consent appears in OpenMRS, maternity-tracker consent/checklist, front-office consent, patient-app consent screen; GDPR/HIPAA NFR mandates it. Person-centric: I see + control who accesses my data; management: consent capture + audit. PHI-boundary aware.
ui_kit_additions.data_deps: consent records from consent service; grant/revoke action; audit link
ui_kit_additions.a11y: plain-language consent text, explicit action confirm, no dark patterns

ui_kit_additions.why: 14 scaffold apps + every new list need a real empty/loading/error triad. Generator emits screens that 404 today; a standard EmptyState (with create-first CTA) + ErrorState + Skeleton keeps person surfaces friendly not blank.
ui_kit_additions.data_deps: none (presentational); CTA wired to create action
ui_kit_additions.a11y: status role, actionable CTA, not just decorative

screens.structure: ward/bed board (occupancy) + admission/discharge/transfer forms
screens.person_surface: My stay: my admission status, my care team, my discharge plan + checklist - person-centric stay journey
screens.management_surface: ward bed-management board + ADT workflow + occupancy mgmt
screens.person_centric_reshape: org bed board becomes a person stay/discharge journey; bed mgmt is management variant
screens.simplification_note: person sees stay journey; staff keep bed board/ADT
screens.no_loss_check: bed mgmt, ADT, occupancy, transfer retained

screens.structure: item list + stock moves + warehouses + work orders/BOM + stock ledger report + suppliers
screens.person_surface: n/a primarily management; person analog = 'my stuff/assets' simple inventory
screens.management_surface: full supply chain: stock, warehouse, manufacturing, procurement, ledger
screens.person_centric_reshape: supply chain stays management; simplify multi-step Odoo/ERPNext moves with sane defaults
screens.simplification_note: guided stock actions replace multi-screen flows; ledger kept
screens.no_loss_check: warehouse, manufacturing, BOM, procurement, ledger retained

screens.structure: employee directory + employee 360 + payroll/expenses/assets
